questions.question: What is a Tuple in TypeScript?
options: An array with a fixed number of elements and specific types at each position
A way to merge two objects

options: It prevents the property from being modified after initialization
It forces the property to be a string

questions.question: Which utility type makes all properties of an existing type optional?

It is used for variables that will never have a value

questions.question: How do you define an Intersection Type?
What is the 'never' type used for?
options: For functions that always return true
For values that should never occur, such as a function that always throws an error
